prose:
Frontier-orbital calculation on molecular oxygen (O₂) using DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level (tier 'standard', density-fit) in PySCF. Gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 3 (triplet ground state, open-shell UKS). Geometry: user-supplied .xyz, single-point (not relaxed at this level). SCF converged in 7 cycles. No warnings reported. Integrity status: ok, trustworthy: true.

Headline result — HOMO–LUMO gap: 5.2880586 eV.
HOMO energy: −8.8739616 eV (degenerate, singly-occupied π* orbitals consistent with ³Σ⁻g ground state).
LUMO energy: −3.5859031 eV (degenerate).
Total electronic energy: −150.38872 Hartree.

CLI: /home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier --method dft --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --charge 0 --mult 3 /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/oxygen/oxygen.xyz
